input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.8.8.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.8.8.2
            TITLE: impact attenuator functional requirements

            CONTENT:
            rule F.8.8.2: Impact Attenuator Functional Requirements
F.8.8.2 Impact Attenuator Functional Requirements 
These are not test requirements 
a. Decelerates the vehicle at a rate not exceeding 20 g average and 40 g peak 
b. Energy absorbed must be more than 7350 J  
When:  
• Total mass of Vehicle is 300 kg  
• Impact velocity is 7.0 m/s

final_answer: rule F.8.8.2: Impact Attenuator Functional Requirements F.8.8.2 Impact Attenuator Functional Requirements These are not test requirements a. Decelerates the vehicle at a rate not exceeding 20 g average and 40 g peak b. Energy absorbed must be more than 7350 J When: • Total mass of Vehicle is 300 kg • Impact velocity is 7.0 m/s
